recommendations.title: The Strange Color of Your Body's Tears
recommendations.overview: Returning home from a business trip to discover his wife missing, a man delves deeper and deeper into a surreal kaleidoscope of half-baked leads, seduction, deceit, and murder.

recommendations.title: Amer
recommendations.overview: Ana is confronted with body and desire at three key moments of her life. As a young girl, she brings her dead grandpa back to life. In her puberty, she discovers the power of decay and sexuality. Finally, she wrestles with loss and loneliness when sh

recommendations.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
recommendations.overview: While the Civil War rages on between the Union and the Confederacy, three men – a quiet loner, a ruthless hitman, and a Mexican bandit – comb the American Southwest in search of a strongbox containing $200,000 in stolen gold.

recommendations.title: The ABCs of Death
recommendations.overview: An ambitious anthology film featuring segments directed by over two dozen of the world's leading talents in contemporary genre film. Inspired by children's educational ABC books, the film comprises 26 individual chapters, each helmed by a different d
recommendations.director: Bruno Forzani, Hélène Cattet, Adrián García Bogliano, Jon Schnepp, Ernesto Díaz Espinoza, Xavier Gens, Jorge Michel Grau, Yudai Yamaguchi, Banjong Pisanthanakun, Ti West, Jason Eisener, Jake West, Adam Wingard, Timo Tjahjanto, Simon Rumley, Kaare Andrews, Noboru Iguchi, Andrew Traucki, Ben Wheatley, Thomas Cappelen Malling, Marcel Sarmiento, Lee Hardcastle, Yoshihiro Nishimura, Srđan Spasojević, Anders Morgenthaler, Angela Bettis, Nacho Vigalondo

recommendations.title: The Harder They Fall
recommendations.overview: Gunning for revenge, outlaw Nat Love saddles up with his gang to take down enemy Rufus Buck, a ruthless crime boss who just got sprung from prison.

recommendations.title: The Grand Duel
recommendations.overview: A grizzled ex-sheriff helps a man framed for murder to confront the powerful trio of brothers who want him dead.

recommendations.title: Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid
recommendations.overview: As the west rapidly becomes civilized, a pair of outlaws in 1890s Wyoming find themselves pursued by a posse and decide to flee to South America in hopes of evading the law.

recommendations.title: Appaloosa
recommendations.overview: Two friends hired to police a small town that is suffering under the rule of a rancher find their job complicated by the arrival of a young widow.

recommendations.title: Sissi: The Fateful Years of an Empress
recommendations.overview: After a wonderful time in Hungary Sissi falls extremely ill and must retreat to a Mediterranean climate to rest. The young empress’ mother takes her from Austria to recover in Madeira.

recommendations.title: Apache Gold
